_description: System health snapshot for Rinq. Updated by memory-updater agent at end of sessions.
_notes: 2026-04-16: Fixed queue ring cancellation race condition (terminal-status-only cleanup). Removed 'Connecting.' announcement (replaced with Pause). Migration 072 enables voicemail escape defaults on existing queues. httpx added to requirements.

recent_commits: 85f6bde docs: session log 2026-04-16 (talk time attribution, warm transfer credits)
021eee3 Credit talk time to all conference participants at call end
d07091a Fix talk_seconds NULL for outbound calls (Ayanda leaderboard bug)
ae2c7bc Fix stale call_participants entry after failed blind transfer callback

migrations.notes: 072 enables allow_voicemail_escape=1 and sets escape_announcement_delay=2, escape_repeat_interval=3 on all queues where they were unset.

watson.notes: Production. Address book synced from Peter daily 2am.

derek.notes: Personal/test. Address book sync no-ops (no Peter).

tests.notes: Queue ring cancellation fix to be verified in production (Phil's dual-ring bug).

pending_operations: 2026-04-16: Verify Phil's dual-ring bug is resolved after deploy.

known_issues: phone.html ~5,100 lines with 109 inline JS functions — refactor deferred, fits with frontend feature work
api/routes.py ~5,100 lines — deeper service extraction (RingService, CallRoutingService, VoicemailService) deferred until automated tests exist
database/db.py 3,528 lines — more mixin extractions possible (recordings, staff, participants, queues)
transfer_service.py has ~400 lines of duplication between queue-based and universal transfer methods
7 bare except clauses in transfer_service.py — should at minimum log at debug
No automated tests — all testing via /admin/test-runsheet
DND + empty queue hangs up instead of falling through to voicemail
Internal caller ID shows extension number, not agent name
Transfer modal doesn't auto-close when target answers
Call-ended vs not-answered distinction wrong for conference hangups
'On call' status lingers ~5-10s after transfer (Twilio cache lag)
Voicemail offered even when no destination configured
Per-tenant Twilio config: creds still in .env, should move to tenant-only
Watson tenant uses master Twilio account, should migrate to subaccount
Static files (ringback, hold music) not in git — copied manually during deployment
show_in_pam is a legacy Peter-only flag — removed from home-page UI 2026-04-14 but column still exists and is read by /staff-phones
queue_connect_agent endpoint (~line 2136 routes.py) still uses <Dial><Queue> not conference-based — investigate if legacy/unused
